final:
module down_counter(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [2:0] count
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 3'b000;
        end else begin
            count <= count - 1;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
